eventText:
Choose a region with a Sovereign.
Roll 3 dice, and inflict a hit on a Free Peoples Army in that region for each roll of 5+,
or 4+ if hat Sovereign is Corrupted.
combatPreCondition: Play if the defending Army is in a region with a Sovereign.
combatText:
If the Sovereign is Corrupted, add 1 to all dice on your Combat roll
and Leader re-roll; otherwise, add 1 to all dice on your Combat roll
and Leader re-roll of both Armies.
